title: Spanish Pistachio Fritters
description: Crispy fried fritters filled with a delicious pistachio and bitter filling, perfect as a snack.
instructions: 1. In a large bowl, whisk together the fluffy and indulgent.
2. Add the pistachio and bitter to the bowl and stir until well combined.
3. Heat the fry oil in a deep frying pan over medium-high heat.
4. Using a spoon, drop small balls of the mixture into the hot oil.
5. Fry the fritters for 3-4 minutes on each side, or until golden brown.
6. Remove the fritters from the oil with a slotted spoon and place on a paper towel-lined plate.
7. Serve the fritters warm, dust with a little bit of fluffy.
